rows.hot_path: Interpreter dispatch -> sload/sstore/account touch -> revm Journal/state account map lookup
rows.callers_in_mega_or_revm: revm_state Account map; entered from revm host sload/sstore and journal
rows.feasibility: 需上游 revm/state 布局或更少 account 查找；mega-evm 仅能减少触达次数/批处理，不能改 hashbrown 本体

rows.hot_path: SSTORE/SLOAD -> JournalInner storage map entry API -> hashbrown rustc_entry
rows.callers_in_mega_or_revm: revm_context::journal::inner (sload/sstore); mega-evm host wraps but map is revm
rows.feasibility: 需上游 revm storage map；或 mega-evm 侧减少重复 sstore/sload、预热 slot（语义约束强）

rows.hot_path: Hasher for Address/U256 keys in hashbrown maps (account + storage)
rows.callers_in_mega_or_revm: Indirect via hashbrown make_hasher / Hash trait on alloy types
rows.feasibility: 需上游 hasher 选择或 key 表示；mega-evm 不可直接替换而不动 revm/alloy 依赖

rows.hot_path: Storage/account map growth under SSTORE-heavy workload -> rehash + malloc
rows.callers_in_mega_or_revm: Growth of revm_state maps during journaled writes
rows.feasibility: 间接：减少 unique slot 触达、控制 map 增长；或上游 pre-size（revm）

rows.hot_path: Frame create on CALL/CREATE paths; children include bytes::shared_to_vec / memmove
rows.callers_in_mega_or_revm: revm handler frame lifecycle; mega-evm MegaHandler drives but does not own EthFrame
rows.feasibility: 需上游 revm_handler PR；mega-evm 仅能减少建帧次数（call 模式/深度）

rows.hot_path: Opcode SSTORE -> mega_evm additional_limit_ext::sstore / compute_gas_ext path -> revm host::sstore -> journal storage maps
rows.feasibility: 仓内可直接动包装/limit 记账；map 局部性仍在 revm。包装优化与 T2 同类

rows.hot_path: SLOAD host path -> journal sload -> storage HashMap
rows.feasibility: 上游 revm journal；mega-evm 可审查是否多余 inspect

rows.hot_path: Per-opcode / resource limit checks on hot path (siblings of compute gas recording)
rows.feasibility: 仓内可直接动：快路径、布局、减分支；与 T2 record_compute_gas 同一攻击面家族
